title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 408.595 - Financial institutions to make other annual report, contents
text:
408.595.  Financial institutions to make other annual report, contents. — Not later than sixty days following the close of each fiscal year, every state financial institution which accepts savings deposits shall certify to the appropriate division director the total savings deposits of the institution accepted by the institution in the state of Missouri as of the close of the fiscal year, and the total amount of the institution's investments in loans, other than loans originated in the state of Missouri and in negotiable instruments other than loans.
(L. 1979 S.B. 305) 
Effective 1-01-80
